author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Search for the lepton-flavour violating decays $B^+ \to \pi^+ \mu^\pm e^\mp$
abstract: the first search for the lepton-flavour violating decays $B^+ \to \pi^+ \mu^\pm e^\mp$ in proton-proton collisions, using data collected by the LHCb experiment between 2011 and 2018, corresponding to an integrated luminosity of 9 fb$^{−1}$
